response:
Alex reads books.
Books bring joy.
Joy fills hearts.
Hearts love stories.
Stories change minds.
Minds seek truth.
Truth opens doors.
Doors lead far.
Far paths wind.
Wind blows soft.
Soft pages turn.
Turns take time.
Time flies fast.
Fast days pass.
Pass many weeks.
Weeks hold change.
Change brings growth.
Growth needs effort.
Effort builds strength.
Strength fuels hope.
Hope guides souls.
Souls find peace.
Peace calms fears.
Fears fade away.
Away goes doubt.
Doubt leaves space.
Space holds dreams.
Dreams spark vision.
Vision clears fog.
Fog lifts high.
High skies shine.
Shine bright light.
Light warms cold.
Cold turns warm.
Warm days end.
End starts new.
